---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Guides and posts by roadmap step"
description: "First Break AI cohort blog — step-by-step guides that follow the roadmap. Run models locally, understand inference, and build in the open."
css: ../styles/blog.css
---

Cohort guides and posts are organized by the [Roadmap](../roadmap.qmd). Start with the step you're on.

## By roadmap step

::: {.blog-cards}

:::: {.blog-card .blog-card-step-1 .blog-card-no-post}
[Step 1]{.blog-card-label}

### First use of AI for coding

::: {.blog-card-desc}
Set up a Quarto blog, GitHub, and use your AI IDE.
:::

[See Roadmap](../roadmap.qmd){.blog-card-link}
::::

:::: {.blog-card .blog-card-step-2}
[Step 2]{.blog-card-label}

### Run a model locally

::: {.blog-card-desc}
Run Qwen3 0.6B in pure C. Tokens, BPE, chat templates, attention, KV cache — all in one C binary.
:::

[Read guide](qwen3-run-locally.qmd){.blog-card-link}
::::

:::: {.blog-card .blog-card-step-3 .blog-card-no-post}
[Step 3]{.blog-card-label}

### Inference deep dive

::: {.blog-card-desc}
vLLM, quantization, batching, APIs.
:::

[See Roadmap](../roadmap.qmd){.blog-card-link}
::::

:::

::: {.blog-back}
[← Back to Roadmap](../roadmap.qmd)
:::
